prompt: Blocker cue at neutral depth: choose call.
why_v1: Call controls risk when stack depth does not support a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because the blocker adds protection, but not enough edge to justify forcing a bigger pot at this depth.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better here because the blocker gives the hand some protection, but not enough edge to force a bigger pot at this depth. A controlled continue keeps your equity realization intact while the pressure line is still too thin.
